meta.title: Just Before The Meeting — macOS menu bar countdown
meta.description: Menu bar app for Mac: Google Calendar aware countdown and theme music before your meetings.

hero.title: Just Before The Meeting
hero.lede: A tiny Mac app that lives in your menu bar, watches Google Calendar, and plays your news-style theme with a pulsing countdown right before the events you care about.
hero.ctaNote: Host your signed & notarized JustBeforeTheMeeting.dmg and point this button to its URL.

features.heading: What it does
items: Background menu bar app — no Dock icon; always within reach.
Google Calendar — OAuth sign-in, polls your calendars, respects filters.
Custom sound — bring your own news sting (mp3/m4a) or bundle default_theme.
Pulsing countdown — red/orange timer in the menu bar; click to dismiss early.
Per-event control — rules (all / video / keyword) plus toggles for upcoming items.

how.heading: How it works
steps: Download and open the app (after you notarize & distribute it).
Add your Google OAuth Client ID to the app’s Info.plist (or your build settings).
In Google Cloud Console, add authorized redirect URI: jbtm://oauth.
Connect Google, pick sound & rules in Settings, and keep the app running.

footer: Open source layout — replace download link when your DMG is live.

macos.app.name: Just Before The Meeting
macos.menu.upcoming_connect_prompt: Connect Google Calendar to see scheduled countdowns
macos.menu.upcoming_empty: No matching events in the next 48 hours
macos.about.body:
Menu bar countdown and theme before your meetings.

Set your Google OAuth Client ID in Info.plist (GoogleOAuthClientID).
macos.general.countdown_hint: Music and the menu bar timer run for the shorter of countdown length and time until the event starts.
macos.calendar.oauth_hint: Add **GoogleOAuthClientID** to Info.plist. Create an OAuth **Desktop** client in Google Cloud Console and add redirect URI **jbtm://oauth**.
macos.events.empty_hint: Connect Google Calendar and sync to see events.
macos.sound.default_theme_hint: Using **default_theme** from the app bundle if present (mp3/m4a).
macos.oauth.error.missing_client_id: Set GoogleOAuthClientID in Info.plist (Google Cloud OAuth client).
macos.oauth.error.missing_code: OAuth did not return an authorization code.
macos.oauth.error.loopback_server: Could not start local sign-in server.
macos.oauth.html.error_body: No authorization code received. Close this tab and try again.
macos.oauth.html.success_body: You can close this tab and return to Just Before The Meeting.
